articles.title: Solana Rises As BlackRock Brings Its $1,700,000,000 Tokenized Treasury Fund to Ethereum Rival’s Chain
articles.description: Solana (SOL) is green on the day on reports that BlackRock is moving its blockchain-based money market fund onto the Ethereum (ETH) competitor’s network. Fortune reports that the world’s largest asset manager is adding its $1. 7 billion BlackRock USD Institutional Digital Liquidity Fund (BUIDL) to the Solana blockchain

articles.title: Custodia, Vantage launch first US bank-issued stablecoin called Avit on Ethereum
articles.description: Custodia Bank and Vantage Bank have issued the first US bank-backed stablecoin, called Avit, on a public blockchain network, according to a March 25 press release. The stablecoin was used in a series of test transactions with a business customer.

articles.title: BlackRock Brings BUIDL Fund onto Solana
articles.description: The $1. 7B tokenized treasury fund is already available on Ethereum, Optimism, Arbitrum, Polygon, Avalanche, and Aptos.

articles.title: Elon Musk’s D.O.G.E creates more jobless people than ever in America
articles.description: Jobless federal workers are piling into the market as Elon Musk’s D. O. G. E continues gutting U. S. government agencies. A new report published Tuesday by Indeed shows a massive surge in job applications from employees directly impacted by the Department of Government Efficiency, which began cutting aggressively after Trump’s January 2025 inauguration. According to Indeed’s numbers, job […]

articles.title: US state Kentucky enacts law supporting self-custody of cryptocurrencies
articles.description: HB 701 bill, titled 'An Act relating to blockchain digital assets,' aims to foster a crypto-friendly environment in Kentucky.

articles.title: XRP Price Prediction: Analysts now eye $10 by 2030
